results.result_notes: Source time printed as –:– with DNF status

event_comments: Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
cumulative_event_comments:
The fifth event in the 2019 Wednesday Evening Series will be held at Shoreview Park and Shoreline Community College! The Wednesday Evening Series is our most relaxed, casual set of navigation events, held in local parks once the weather warms up. These events are a little more low-key than those in the Winter League, and we typically offer a barbeque afterward for all participants. Decompress after work and bring a coworker or two along. Or meet your family at the park and enjoy a night off from cooking. Or meet a bunch of friends at the park for an evening of exploring together, chatting over some food, and finishing up with frisbee on the lawn.
Events in the Wednesday Evening Series are generally less challenging (both physically and navigationally) than many of our other events, and are therefore great for beginners and those less experienced with orienteering – while also offering a challenge to longtime participants of the sport.
Check back later for special notes from the Course Designer(s).
